hotel_name: Grand Wailea, A Waldorf Astoria Resort

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Not a value for money. Had high expectations but underwhelmed.

reviews.title: Never travel to this dirty place
reviews.positives: Just fire in yard and location
reviews.negatives:
This is too dirty hotel 
There was a beetle in my room!!!!
Pool water was not clear and bad smell
Pool towel was not soft and it was too old
You don’t have service in your room!!!
I ordered 2bottle of water at 10:00 pm and I never recieve it

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Outdated, not a great value, pool is great

reviews.title: Not worth money
reviews.text: Service was really bad - I asked for honeymoon (3 times) arrangements but never got it. Facilities are a bit old.

reviews.title: No hot water
reviews.text: Eventually after some one came to confirm with a thermometer that the water was not hot , it did warm up and get hot hours later,I was never compensated or even acknowledged and no one contacted me about this issue, I only stayed for one night…

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: After many previous stays over the years, this was disappointing. It's always been expensive, but this was excruciatingly expensive with premium charges for every little thing. The pool, which has always been a joy, had the deck junked up with cabanas everywhere, reducing the views and pool seating, making it very stressful. Room was fine, staff was nice, breakfast outrageously expensive. We will not be returning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Everything was perfect. The only downside is that the valet parking fee is too expensive. Self-parking is not allowed, and it's $65 a day.

reviews.title: Pampered and relaxing
reviews.positives: Spa, spa, spa... Oh, and a beach

reviews.title: Nice Stay
reviews.text:
We had a nice time. Beautiful spot with nice staff and great facilities. Although, it’s a bit overpriced for what you get.

The one thing that really irks you is the parking situation. We learned on arrival that you are forced to use valet parking. The valet attendant was a bit of a jerk on arrival because he had to explain the parking situation to us about three times because we had never been there before. I can empathize because he probably has to explain it 30 times a day because it’s so ridiculous.

So they force you to use valet since there is no overnight public parking anywhere close to the hotel. Half way through our trip we learned the valet parking is $65 a day. No where does it say you have to pay for the valet parking on arrival. Booking on Agoda does not tell you that. I guess I was naive to think the valet was included since you pay a fortune for the room and it was required. But either way, $65 is absurd. 

Then every time you want to retrieve your car to leave the property for dinner or an activity you are expected to tip. And it takes much longer than if we could just park ourselves.

So for the price of $65 a day + tip we get a service that is a bigger hassle than if we could just park ourselves. 

It’s not about the money, it’s the obvious scam that makes you mad.

reviews.title: Very beautiful resort.
reviews.text: The resort was so beautiful. The downside is that it's very, very expensive~

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Would come back again

reviews.title: Nice and confortable hotel
reviews.positives: The pool, close to big beach, staff was wery good

reviews.title: For the big, fat beach hotel experience
reviews.text: All in all a great big resort; however in some ways too big with required bracelets for the pool, queuing for towels and reservations required to get covered pool and beach seats. Napua Club more limited in selection and amenities than others we've been to and for the price, expected more.  Almost full sized, great tropical scented bath products in the room.
reviews.positives: Beautiful grounds, great service, proximity to beach

reviews.title: Staff
reviews.text: The concierge who spoke Japanese was wonderful. The shop staff was also very kind.

reviews.title: Beautiful resort
reviews.text: We had a very relaxing 4 night stay. Rooms were stunning! My only suggestion is to make the process easier for pool lounges. If towels and no personal belongings then fold down the chairs so we know they are free. Will come again! Best pools and slides! Very expensive to ear  at the resort but plenty of restaurants a quick walk or uber away.

reviews.title: Good location but would have liked consistent friendly customer service and a cleaner room. We would not stay again.
reviews.positives: The spa was great. The location was convenient for day tours and off property activities.
reviews.negatives: The customer service was bad particularly the bell staff and front desk. The bugs were bad which could be improved with better weather stripping under the door. You could see light coming through the bottom of the door so bugs had open access to come in. The bathroom was not cleaned well. The shower glass was dirty and there was hair on the floor. Two pillowcases had something black on them. There was underwear in the dresser from a previous occupant.

reviews.title: Great resort for families
reviews.text: We had a fantastic time at the Grand Wailea. Staff was super friendly, the restaurants were all really good, and our kids absolutely loved the slides and pool area. Beach access was great too. Would definitely go again!

reviews.title: very disappointed came home 2 days early but required to pay for those 2 days!!
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Very limited dinning options.  Three restaurants closed and walked nest door for meals.  $600 per day pool cabana rentals with no half day rental or other option.

reviews.title: Quiktrip
reviews.text: Stayed here a few times, so remains one of the best,
reviews.room_type: 1 King Terrace Vw Mobility Access W/ 3 X3shw

reviews.title: Great trip over Christmas
reviews.text: Staff was excellent, friendly, helpful - really went out of their way.  Food at cafe and Humu was delicious.  Luau was a fantastic setting and very fun.  Pool and water slides were lots of fun.

reviews.title: Spectacular property
reviews.text: I have nothing but great things to say about this hotel. The beds are the best I’ve slept on, the facilities are excellent and the restaurants offer delicious meals. All of the staff I dealt with were fantastic. Would definitely stay here again

reviews.title: A place worth the money!
reviews.text: The leisurely time spent in the garden and hot tub was truly wonderful, and the fast Wi-Fi speed along with the convenient shopping location was appealing. The breakfast offered a variety of options, which was satisfying, and the friendly attitude of the staff was impressive. Overall, all the facilities were well maintained, and the cleanliness was excellent, allowing for a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: It is spacious and nice.
reviews.text: The room was spacious, and there were plenty of things to enjoy, such as the swimming pool and the beach right in front. Valet service is essential because every time you use the car, you have to go through the entry and exit process, and it can be inconvenient to do this when putting in or taking out simple luggage. All the staff were friendly, and the restaurant was excellent.

reviews.title: Spectacular
reviews.text: What a spectacular hotel! Stayed in a beach view room with the most comfortable bed I’ve ever slept on. Dinner at Humuhumunukunukuāpuaʻ was amazing from the service to the food to the bar that is a fish tank. The pools and waterslides were a hit with the adults and kids. All staff we dealt with were fantastic. Celebrated my sisters 10 year wedding anniversary as she was married at the hotel and the room upgrade and special dessert at dinner were a nice touch. Could not recommend this hotel enough!

reviews.title: I'm glad.
reviews.text: The price is high, but it is worth staying.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very nice hotel, great location, beach is very nice also👍 very delicious breakfast.

reviews.title: I really like it.
reviews.text: This is the first accommodation that makes me want to go back! The lobby atmosphere is so nice! The resort pool is really amazing, and the beach in front has such fine sand that it's perfect for kids to play. The room and the bathroom are spacious and nice! Walking on Wailea Beach during the morning stroll feels like being in paradise.

reviews.title: YES YES YES !!!!
reviews.text: Top notch experience from the second I was greeted getting out of our car at valet to the second I checked out. Never have stayed at such an amazing resort!

reviews.title: 近隣施設へのシャトルサービスが欲しい
reviews.text: シャトルバスサービスのサービスがまったくなく、レンタカーかタクシーの利用しかないのは残念。

reviews.title: 大変な滞在でした
reviews.text:
とても期待して行きました。
到着して、チェックインしたところ、部屋をアップグレードすると言われたのですが、1泊だけのアップグレードで、翌日、部屋を変わるように言われました。
オーバーブッキングのため、やむを得なくアップグレードと思われます。近所のコンドミニアムに1泊しました。
翌日、再びホテルに戻り、チェックインしたところ、予約したのと違うタイプの部屋に案内されたので、フロントに言ったところ、ホテルの予約データと私の予約確認書が異なっており、明日、確認して、私の予約が正しければ、部屋を変えるとのこと。
さすがに毎日毎日、荷物を片付けて移動は大変なので、予約通りに部屋に入れてほしいとお願いすると、200ドル追加料金を払わなければならないと。
さらには、そんな安い値段で、そのランクの部屋に泊まれるはずがない、とまで言われました。
マネージャーを呼んでもらい、交渉の末にようやく予約通りの部屋に入れてもらいましたが、全て英語での交渉で大変でした。

reviews.title: プール工事中
reviews.text: 広大なプールが魅力のホテル。到着したらプールは工事中と言われ、正面の小さめのプールのみ営業していた。ホテルからもAgoda からも事前の知らせはなく不満。

reviews.title: 宿泊してみて」
reviews.text: 場所が不便。
reviews.positives: レストランがおいしかった、海に近い、静か。

reviews.title: 素敵なホテル
reviews.text:
とても素敵なホテルでした。
ホテルのチャペルで結婚式をしたのでゲスト用に予約しました。でも１４：３０にフロントに行ったら、１６：３０まで部屋が出来ず待たされたそうです。。。

ホテルは豪華ですが、従業員のサービスの質はイマイチでした。
でも、それを差し引いても、１度は滞在してよかったと思います。
reviews.positives: リゾートホテルの王道

reviews.title: 素敵なホテル
reviews.text:
ホテルで結婚式のため、家族のために予約しました。
そのため、チャペルが目の前に見える、最高に良い部屋を用意してくださいました。
プールも海も最高です。
reviews.positives: リゾートホテルの王道

reviews.title: 大満足！
reviews.text: とても心地よいホテルでした

reviews.title: 너무 이쁜 호텔
reviews.text:
호텔에 있는 수영장과 비치가 너무 좋아서 
다시한번 가보고 싶은 호텔
직원들도 친절하고 룸도 너무 깨끗하고 넓어서 
세계최고급호텔이라고 불러도 아깝지 않다
reviews.positives: 휴양, 친절, 디자인

reviews.title: 허니문 이용후기
reviews.text:
깨끗한 객실이었으나, 바깥에서 객실 내부를 훤히 들여다 볼수도 있는 단점이 있음.
호텔 수영장이 다른 호텔보다 훨씬 넓고 멋진 장점이 있음.
reviews.positives: 깨끗함, 넓은 수영장, 해변 공유

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 벌레 나왔어요… 대왕 큰 시커먼 무언가가 사부작 사부작.. 티비 아래로 사라져서 못 잡고 밤새 찝찝하게 잤어요.. 바퀴인듯😭

reviews.title: 무난한 고급호텔
reviews.text: 가격대비 무난한 호텔입니다. 다만 낮은 가격으로 했더니 가든뷰였는데 발코니가 바로 수영장과 마주보고 있어서 불편한 점이 있었네요. 좀더 가격대를 높여서 파셜오션뷰나 오션뷰로 하는게 나을듯 합니다.
reviews.positives: 넓다, 수영장, 해변

reviews.title: 달콤한 허니믄
reviews.text:
허니문으로 방문했습니다. 가격대비 전혀 아깝지 않고 너무 예쁜정원이라 사진으로 추억을 가득담아 왔습니다.
수영장에 다소 사람이 많고 붐벼서 여유롭지는 못했으나 수영장은 한군데가 아니라서 즐겁게 보낼수 있었습니다.
비치가 바로 앞이라서 석양이 지는 해변은 아름다웠습니다.
reviews.positives: 테라스를 포함해 곳곳이 너무 예쁘게 조성되어있구요, 직원들도 친절하고, 조식도 맛있었습니다.

reviews.title: 허니문으로 좋은곳
reviews.text:
비싼 가격대비 유료이용이 많아서 좀 그랬지만.
와일레아 해변과 비치파라솔 좋았어요.
수영장 물은 좋지않은편임. 냄새났어요... 아무리 사람이 많다해도..  너무 안가는듯.

reviews.title: 하와이의 이미지를 떠올리게 하는 리조트
reviews.text:
객실 컨디션은 보통 이상입니다.
리조트 풀상태는 좋으며 조용하고 편한 휴식을 가질수 있어요
리조트 투숙객 대부분이 백인이라 약간의 위축도 될 수 있지만
여유로운 환경 탓인지 직원, 투숙객 모두 친철함
reviews.positives: 여유로움, 리조트수영장, 조용하고 편함

reviews.title: 마우이 최고의 리조트 중 하나
reviews.text:
마우이 섬의 두 리조트 지역 중 고급 리조트들이 몰려 있는 와일레아 쪽에 있는 리조트 인데, 일단 다른 리조트들에 비해 압도적인 크기가 인상적입니다. 물론 마우이 섬의 리조트들이 오아후 보다는 넓이 면에서 우수하긴 하지만 특히 더 뛰어난 편이고, 수영장과 정원도 매우 인상적입니다. 룸은 시원시원하게 넓게 만들어져 있고, 무엇보다 리조트 전체에 흐르는 고급스러움이 카아나팔리 지역의 리조트들 보다 우수합니다. 인근의 와일레아 숍이 있어서 쇼핑도 편리합니다. 

단점은, 역시 위치인데, 조용한걸 좋아하는 분들에게는 좋지만 활동적인 분들이라면 카아나팔리 지역의 리조트들 보다 다소 떨어집니다. 아무래도 라하이나 타운의 지척에 있는데다가 대부분의 액티비티들이 집중되어 있는 지역이다 보니 그 점에서 다소 아쉽습니다. 다만, 렌트카로 어차피 30분 이내라서 큰 아쉬움은 없습니다.
reviews.positives: 시설, 객실, 고급스러움

reviews.title: 좋았습니다
reviews.text: 허니문

reviews.title: best숙소
reviews.text:
꼭 또 갈거예요
완전 파라다이스

reviews.title: 아주좋아요
reviews.text: 정말 너무 행복한 곳이였습니다. 수영장 진짜 대박 좋아요

reviews.title: 신혼여행
reviews.text: 마우이 최고의 호텔 !! 특히 수영장이 최고 ㅋ 객실 상태도 좋아요

reviews.title: 허니문후기
reviews.text:
경치도너무좋고시설도좋고방도좋고허니문으로
여기는지상천국인거같았어요~~

reviews.title: 정말 최고였습니다.
reviews.text:
신혼여행의 첫번째 숙소였습니다. 제일 저렴한 숙소이기도 했구요.
그런데 제일 좋았던 숙소입니다.
수영장도 크고 위치도 좋고.. 방에서 보는 뷰도 너무 좋습니다.
숲속에있는 느낌이랄까...
하와이에서 묵은 할레쿨라니,안다즈보다 훨씬 좋았어요~
reviews.positives: 시설,뷰,가격

reviews.title: Wouldn’t go there unless going there for a family vacation
reviews.positives: Location was really nice
reviews.negatives: If was big but so busy and full of kids. Property was outdated and I felt like staying at  a luxury motel.

reviews.title: 호텔환경
reviews.text: 최고의호텔 다시가보겠어요
reviews.positives: 위치,친절도,시설

reviews.title: Disappointed. This place is supposed to be premier resort on Maui and did not live up to the expectations. I’ll give the
reviews.positives: Large property with scenic views of the ocean and great beach.
reviews.negatives: Half of the pools were closed down. This was not disclosed at the time of booking. Additionally all the pool side bars and restaurants closed by 4 pm which made it harder to stay by pool and enjoy yourself late afternoon.

reviews.title: 조식이 조금 아쉽지만 전체적으로 훌륭한 리조트입니다.
reviews.text:
추천해드릴만 한 리조트입니다.
리조트 시설을 즐기시는 데만 해도 하루는 꼬박걸리겠더라구요.
주변에 쇼핑센터와 레스토랑이 있습니다.
reviews.positives: 해변, 서비스, 정원

reviews.title: 다시 가고 싶은 호텔
reviews.positives: 편리한 시설, 세심하고 친절한 직원, 주변자연경관

reviews.title: 服务很好，酒店设施景色都很棒。物有所值
reviews.positives: 服务好，酒店的游泳池超级无敌好。

reviews.title: Выбор отеля был ошибкой
reviews.text: Grand был поистине грандом: пять крыльев, огромное количество народу и лежаки стоящие плечом к плечу вдоль бассейна. Были притензии по чистоте номера и  бассейнов. Очень неторопливый валет- паркинг у главного входа (однажды взять машину стоило 40 минут). Не очень удобная система с получением разрешения на лежак на пляже, очереди на завтрак при том что много пустых столов, но их убирают очень неторопливо. Не понимаю почему отель принадлежит сети WALDORF ASTORIA. В этот отель я не приеду больше никогда. Если хочется отеля высокого уровня - рядом стоит FOUR SEASONS Справедливости ради отмечу еще раз красивую территорию с фонтанами, водопадами и тропическими цветами. Прекрасное центральное помещение с баром
reviews.positives: Гаваи прекрасны своим климатом и пляжами. Рассветами и закатами. Самыми самыми дружелюбными людьми на планете. Grand Walea находится на  хорошем пляже в ухоженном дорогом местечке

reviews.title: Fun for kids, okay for adults
reviews.positives: Pool
reviews.negatives: Rooms

reviews.title: Overall nice resort it is on the pricey side. Don't drive unless you want to pay for daily valet parking. Resort fee
reviews.positives: Pool area is the best part of this resort.
reviews.negatives: Rooms are a little outdated and there are a lot of fees.

reviews.title: Wasn’t bad but won’t go back
reviews.positives: Very grand
reviews.negatives: Too big , got lost not accessible in all directions

reviews.title: Ok but not really worth the price with several amenities unavailable.
reviews.positives: It was beautiful.
reviews.negatives: Didn’t really get to enjoy amenities (pools, outdoor luau) or any excursions due to Kona low weather system.    Our Nobu reservation was cancelled due to flooding.  Our flight into Maui was diverted to Honolulu and our hotel reservation was cancelled by the hotel when we didn’t arrive on time.  Lines to check in were very long.  Staff appeared tired and guests even more so.

reviews.title: The staff really made a difference as they made you feel like family
reviews.positives:
Pool facilities were fantastic. All the staff was very helpful and welcoming. The facility was very clean.
The pool was a great spot for the kids. There was lots to do for the smaller kids. Lots of staff supervision around the pool to keep everyone safe.
reviews.negatives: There was no cable television on the TV in the in the unit we had. We had to load applications to be able to watch any television. It would not have made much difference other than we had quite a few days of rain. The controls for the TV were challenging and a booklet or some kind of manual how to use the system

reviews.title: Looking forward to returning
reviews.positives:
All of our requests were fulfilled.  The property exceeded expectations and we plan to return
LOVED the whale watching from our room every morning at dawn

reviews.title: Wonderful resort for relaxation.
reviews.positives: Very spacious room with a nice balcony.  Lots of pools with connecting water slides.  Good bar and food service by the pools.  Very nice lobby and shops.  The sand beach was adequate sized with many lounge chairs for rental.  The staff was very helpful and friendly.  Several good restaurants within the resort.
reviews.negatives: The parking fee of $75/day was exorbitant.  The ice machine by our room didn't work, but was quickly fixed when reported.

reviews.title: Lovely beach, terrific pools, friendly staff, comfortable room. Glad we went in offseason
reviews.positives: Location right at a gorgeous sandy beach
reviews.negatives: Not enough places with shade/paying for chairs

reviews.title: Great family vacation!!
reviews.positives: So many things at the hotel that allowed everyone to hang out there.
reviews.negatives: Can’t think of anything

reviews.title: Beautiful location and resort! Loved all the amenities. We stayed during 4th of July, fun activities all day ending with
reviews.positives: Location and resort grounds are beautiful! Great pools!
reviews.negatives: Parking fee…with the amount you are paying to stay there it should be included. Resort needs some new outdoor furniture for balconies and pool area.

reviews.title: Beautiful location, beautiful resort in need of some TLC…..until then it’s too pricey!
reviews.positives: The location! The pools and the beautiful resort grounds
reviews.negatives: Some items are in need of replacement such as balcony chairs and a fresh coat of paint on balconies. Until those things are replaced and redone I think it’s over priced.

reviews.title: Good location, not enough breakfast spots. The buffet is overrated and the other location takes up to 30 minutes at time
reviews.positives: Eautiful setting
reviews.negatives: The adult pool was full of children often more than less. They charge $65 a night for Valet parking but they are horribly understaffed and getting your car is always delayed. To call ahead and ask for vehicle is a waste of time as they answer seldom and when they do their response is they are too busy to take your ticket #.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location,  amazing landscapes.
reviews.negatives:
I didn't like the "valet only" option for parking.
I didn't like the Breakfast buffet style at HUMUHUMUNUKUNUKUAQUA restaurant. it seems overpriced for what they offer.

reviews.title: Lovely stay, would definitely return
reviews.positives:
We were upgraded to a Napua room and it just about made our trip. It was such a lovely room with the ocean view and size. It also included other perks, including a lounge with breakfast, snacks, and a personal concierge. We had already booked all of our tours so we mostly just enjoyed the lounge benefits. The breakfast and snacks were nothing to write home about per se... and they weren't awfully vegetarian friendly... but they were a bonus we didn't expect and they saved us the hassle of finding ourselves breakfast each morning. 

The staff was also so helpful - I had sat in gum at some point so I asked for warm vinegar and a toothbrush to try to get it out. They brought it right up, which was wonderful and honestly a bit surprising. They had a text service for that kind of thing, which made it so easy to request help.

It was right along the beach path and by a cute little beach.
reviews.negatives:
Mandatory valet parking at $65/day is steep.

The pool chair policy (that the staff would remove things from chairs if they aren't used for over an hour so people didn't just hold chairs all day) was not actually enforced, which was annoying AF. We were by the pool hoping for seats in the shade and there was one set that had stuff on it for over 2 hours with no people coming/going. We told the staff and they just kept pushing us off. We get why they don't actually enforce it - they don't want confrontation with the original people - but it really sucked for us. The people eventually showed up and my husband kind of called them out. They moved their things to another set of two chairs and gave us the originals because they weren't actually staying then either... and then proceeded to leave the chairs "reserved" and empty for another two hours. It was annoying to experience.

reviews.title: Came here for one night for valentines and we did a couples massage.  Best massage over the ritz Carlton in kapalua.  Wo
reviews.positives: Huge property with many ammenities and looks like lots of activities for kids

reviews.title: It was wonderful!
reviews.positives: The location was incredible! The beach, the sunsets, the palm trees, the views, the oceanfront path. The slides and pool was unreal. It was perfect for my family and my mom's 70th birthday celebration with all the little cousins.
reviews.negatives: The lines! There were lines at Lolou the casual coffee shop every morning there were lines to get wrist bands. Even though we were there 3 nights, you had to be there 4 nights in order to have a multi day wrist band so every morning we all needed to wait in line to get a wrist band and towels. After waiting in line for breakfast then waiting in line for wrist bands it made each day feel like the whole vacation was going to be spent waiting in line.

reviews.title: It was heavenly to spend our time in such a wonderful place... Everyone was friendly and helpful.
reviews.positives:
Top notch facilities
  Staff trained really well.  Another world.  Everything thought out including the facilities gardens and rooms.
reviews.negatives: Entertainers in.bar could improve,. Also can't they sing some Hawaiian songs? . Luau food was good but it was only warm by the time it was served..  The entertainment was excellent, particularly the narrator.  Swimming pools and slides are wonderful 👍

reviews.title: Grand Wailea vacation
reviews.positives: Location was great, the grounds were immaculate, the friendliness of the staff. We will be back.
reviews.negatives: The price was a little high but once we got there, it made sense. On-site washer and dryer would have been great because we were getting wet/dirty everyday with pool, beach, hiking, and waterfalls.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The location is great!  Great beach, the pools/slides are amazing and the rooms were nice and clean with good amenities.
reviews.negatives: The food was expensive on property and the spa was under renovation.

reviews.title: Beautiful property and location but extremely overpriced.
